summary: Consolidation system operational: transparent auto-merge on every query, unified DAG view, lazy loading, pre-commit validation, migration tooling, comprehensive documentation

components.dag-consolidator: consolidate multiple DAGs via discovery, merge, validation
components.cross-dag-validator: validate inter-DAG dependencies, artifact flow, propagation rules
components.index-extractor: extract lightweight metadata index for fast lookups
components.lazy-graph-loader: intelligent lazy loading with caching and load strategies
components.cli-auto-merge: transparent consolidation on every CLI command
components.migration-script: one-time migration of existing separate DAGs
components.validate-roadmap-state: pre-commit hook for state validation and index regeneration
components.documentation: user guide, API reference, troubleshooting, architecture decisions

features: Auto-merge on every query - no manual DAG switching
Artifact flow validation - consumes satisfied by upstream produces
Phase boundary enforcement - no backward cross-DAG dependencies
Propagated constraint preservation - artifact-exists rules respected
Lightweight indexing - fast producer/consumer queries, phase filtering
Lazy loading - conditional full DAG load based on strategy
Cached results - head.json and head-index.json for performance
Pre-commit validation - prevents stale state commits
Dry-run migration - inspect before consolidating existing DAGs
ready_for: Transparent auto-merge on every CLI command
Parallel visibility across multiple independent tracks
Token-efficient lazy loading for LLM agents
Validation and enforcement via pre-commit hook
